statement: In every magma, Equation 74 (`x = y * (y * (x * z))`) implies Equation 2583 (`x = (y * ((z * x) * w)) * u`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0122
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op y (op x z)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z x) w)) u)
